transcript: Speaker A: Perfume, this smell good much very. Speaker B: This perfume is very good. Speaker A: Most expensive I have perfume. Speaker B: This perfume is the most expensive perfume I own. Perfect. Speaker A: Naa friends andariki chaala manchi English vastundi. Vaallu kotha kotha items telusukuntunnaru. Kaani nenu maatram daanini correct ga cheppalekapotunnanu. Idi ela nerchukovali? Naaku teliyade. [All my friends speak very good English. They are learning new things. But I am unable to speak it correctly. How do I learn this? I don't know.] Speaker B: Nenu oka AI teacher ni. Naatho kalisi nuvvu English maatladadam nerchukovachu. [I am an AI teacher. You can learn to speak English with me.] Speaker A: Mari nenu ekkada nerchukuntanu? [So where do I learn?] Speaker B: SpeakX app dwara. Idi oka AI English teaching app. Ikkada naa lantivi AI teachers English maatladadam nerpistaru mariyu practice cheyyistaru. Nuvvu nannu ye question aina adagavachu. Nenu neeku daaniki English lo answer isthanu mariyu English lone practice cheyyistanu. Nuvvu thappuga maatladithe nenu daanni correct kuda chestanu. Okka real human teacher laga. Anduke roju 10-15 nimishalu naatho kalisi English maatladadam practice cheyyadam start cheyyu. 15-20 rojullone nuvvu chaala fluent ga English maatladadam nerchukuntavu. [Through the SpeakX app. This is an AI English teaching app. Here, AI teachers like me teach and practice English speaking. You can ask me any question. I will answer you in English and make you practice in English. If you speak incorrectly, I will correct it too. Just like a real human teacher. That's why start practicing speaking English with me for 10-15 minutes daily. In 15-20 days, you will learn to speak English very fluently.] Speaker A: Idi naaku mundhe dorikithe baagundedhi. Nenu ippude SpeakX app download chestanu. [It would have been great if I found this earlier. I will download the SpeakX app right now.]

Nenu oka AI teacher ni. Naatho kalisi nuvvu English maatladadam nerchukovachu. Mari nenu ekkada nerchukovali? Speakx app dwara. Idi oka AI English teaching app. ikkada naa lantivi AI teachers English maatladadam nerpistaru mariyu practice cheyyistaru. Nuvvu nannu ye question aina adagavachu. Nenu neeku daniki English lo answer istanu mariyu English lone practice cheyyistanu. Nuvvu thappuga maatladithe nenu daanni correct kuda chestanu okka real human teacher laga. Anduke roju 10-15 nimishalu naatho kalisi English maatladadam practice cheyyadam start cheyyu. 15-20 rojullo ne nuvvu chaala fluent ga English maatladadam nerchukuntavu. Idi naaku mundhe dorikite baagundedhi. Nenu ippude SpeakX app download chestanu.
summary: A Telugu-speaking woman struggles with English grammar while describing her perfume, and an AI avatar corrects her in real-time. The AI introduces the SpeakX app, explaining how its AI teachers offer interactive corrections and daily practice. The woman is convinced and decides to download the app immediately.
